recipe.title: Pulled brisket chilli
recipe.description: Jamie swears by this pulled beef brisket chilli recipe because it has more texture than regular chilli, the same goes for his hand scrunched guacamole.

ingredients.name: ½ a bunch of fresh coriander

steps.descr: Place the beef on a board and lightly score one side
steps.instructions: Place the beef on a board and lightly score one side.

on_enter.say: Place the beef on a board and lightly score one side.

steps.descr: Bash the cinnamon, cumin, paprika and oregano in pestle...
steps.instructions: Bash the cinnamon, cumin, paprika and oregano in pestle and mortar, then rub into the cuts in the beef. Season well with sea salt and black pepper, drizzle over a little oil and brown the brisket well in a large pan over a high heat.

on_enter.say: Bash the cinnamon, cumin, paprika and oregano in pestle and mortar, then rub into the cuts in the beef. Season well with sea salt and black pepper, drizzle over a little oil and brown the brisket well in a large pan over a high heat.

steps.descr: Place the bay leaves, whole peppers, plum tomatoes...
steps.instructions: Place the bay leaves, whole peppers, plum tomatoes (breaking them up with the back of a spoon as you go), and the stock in a large pot and bring to the boil.

on_enter.say: Place the bay leaves, whole peppers, plum tomatoes (breaking them up with the back of a spoon as you go), and the stock in a large pot and bring to the boil.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, deseed half the chillies, then finely slice...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, deseed half the chillies, then finely slice them all. Peel and finely slice the onions, then pick and finely chop the coriander.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, deseed half the chillies, then finely slice them all. Peel and finely slice the onions, then pick and finely chop the coriander.

steps.descr: Add the chilli and onion to the pan with the brisket,...
steps.instructions: Add the chilli and onion to the pan with the brisket, cook for 5 minutes, then transfer the lot to the large pot, cover, and leave to simmer for 4 to 4½ hours, or until beautifully tender, stirring occasionally and adding splashes of water to loosen, if needed.

on_enter.say: Add the chilli and onion to the pan with the brisket, cook for 5 minutes, then transfer the lot to the large pot, cover, and leave to simmer for 4 to 4½ hours, or until beautifully tender, stirring occasionally and adding splashes of water to loosen, if needed.

steps.descr: Gently pull the beef apart using 2 forks
steps.instructions: Gently pull the beef apart using 2 forks. Remove the bay, add a little vinegar to taste, scatter over the coriander and adjust the seasoning to taste.

on_enter.say: Gently pull the beef apart using 2 forks. Remove the bay, add a little vinegar to taste, scatter over the coriander and adjust the seasoning to taste.

steps.descr: For the guacamole, squeeze the avocado flesh into a...
steps.instructions: For the guacamole, squeeze the avocado flesh into a bowl, discarding the skin and stones. Pick and roughly tear in the coriander leaves, peel and finely gate in the red onion, and squeeze in the lime juice.

on_enter.say: For the guacamole, squeeze the avocado flesh into a bowl, discarding the skin and stones. Pick and roughly tear in the coriander leaves, peel and finely gate in the red onion, and squeeze in the lime juice.

steps.descr: Have a taste, then tweak with more salt, pepper or lime...
steps.instructions: Have a taste, then tweak with more salt, pepper or lime juice, if needed. Roughly chop then scrunch in the tomatoes, picking out any large bits of skin.

on_enter.say: Have a taste, then tweak with more salt, pepper or lime juice, if needed. Roughly chop then scrunch in the tomatoes, picking out any large bits of skin.

steps.descr: Deseed and finely grate in the chilli flesh and mix well
steps.instructions: Deseed and finely grate in the chilli flesh and mix well. Serve with the chilli, tortillas and dollops of yoghurt. Delicious served with a fresh green salad on the side, too.

on_enter.say: Deseed and finely grate in the chilli flesh and mix well. Serve with the chilli, tortillas and dollops of yoghurt. Delicious served with a fresh green salad on the side, too.
